input:
"#CONTEXT#
You are a B2B sales strategist writing a GTM intelligence memo for a sales team. You will receive information about:
1. A client company whose product is being sold
2. A lead who previously worked at a company that is a known customer of the client
3. The lead's current company where they now hold a relevant role

The lead's past company is a known customer of the client. The lead held a relevant role there and would have been exposed to or aware of the client's product. They have since moved to a new company in a similar or more senior role."

"#INPUTS#
client_company_name: Nostra
client_company_domain: nostra.ai
client_company_description: Nostra helps the world’s leading ecommerce brands future-proof their digital infrastructure with cutting-edge edge technology. We enable high-growth DTC companies to deploy enterprise-grade infrastructure in minutes, not months. Our edge platform is designed to accelerate site speed, increase conversion rates, and drive more revenue, while protecting your brand from modern threats. With products like Edge Delivery Engine, Edge Protection, Edge ID, and Edge Crawler, we give brands the tools to: • Boost performance by 20–30% • Block ad bot traffic before it hits your site • Extend cookie life for better attribution • Optimize content for LLM indexing and AI-native search Brands like Jolie, Amiri, and Olukai rely on Nostra to deliver faster, safer, smarter ecommerce experiences

lead_full_name: 
lead_linkedin_url: Janelle Marpa
lead_current_job_title: https://www.linkedin.com/in/janelle-marpa-76310538
lead_current_company_name: Director of Marketing
lead_current_company_domain: Kaia Naturals
lead_current_company_description: kaianaturals.com

lead_past_company_name: Known for effective underarm routines: the takesumi detox and the takesumi bright, kaia naturals has helped consumers find success with natural deodorant and intimate body concerns

Providing solutions for common underarm concerns such as excess odor, sweat, dark spot pigmentation and the detox period that occurs when transitioning from antiperspirant to natural deodorant. 

Founded by beauty industry veteran Mary Futher (a.k.a. @MadameSweat on TikTok) who saw the complexities of often overlooked underarm problems and wanted to eliminate the stigma associated with unsexy body issues. 

kaia naturals is leading the clean underarm care category with a line of luxurious, high performance, cruelty-free and award-winning products made with plant-based ingredients and planet friendly packaging, specifically designed for problem underarms.

Our products have won awards from Allure, Nylon magazine and MindBodyGreen.

In 2017, Mary Futher, was one of ten female founders selected by SEPHORA across the U.S., Canada, Mexico and Brazil to participate in their SEPHORA Accelerate program. This exclusive mentorship program was created to support female entrepreneurs in all areas of the beauty industry with a focus on social impact.

OUR BACKSTORY:

In 2009, Mary Futher left her career in corporate beauty and set out to create her own clean beauty brand. Being a busy travelling senior executive Mary often found herself reaching for traditional makeup wipes, but would find they constantly irritated her eyes. Soon Mary began digging deeper into the ingredients used in her everyday beauty products and was shocked to find all the toxic ingredients she was putting onto her body every day. 

Launching first with juicy bamboo cleansing cloths, the brand has expanded to create more award-winning products like the takesumi detox charcoal deodorants, the underarm bar, the sweat powder, the takesumi bright collection, the takesumi detox overnight dry shampoo, and the vitamin cleanse.
lead_past_company_domain: Forever 21
lead_past_company_description: forever21.com
lead_past_company_job_title: Forever 21 continues to be a fashion industry leader with a mission to make the latest trends accessible to all. F21 persists on staying ahead of innovation and providing styles and fit that our customers love. While reinventing for now and beyond, we’re seeking passionate and creative new family members to join us on this adventure! F21 continues to operate E-commerce and 450 locations across the U.S. along with maintaining a strong brand DNA with consumers and within the fashion industry. 

In February 2020, Forever 21 came under new ownership made up of Simon Property Group, Brookfield Property Partners, and Authentic Brands Group. Under this new ownership F21 has the financial strength and long term view that will prepare us for the future, while continuing to set the same high standards as it always has. Join our team and learn the inner sanctum of the global fashion industry, while we build the new Forever 21! 

Forever 21 is operated by SPARC Group LLC.
 
About SPARC Group LLC
SPARC Group LLC offers operational and strategic expertise including retail and e-commerce management, sourcing, design and technology for leading global brands. SPARC Group is a joint venture between Simon Property Group, a preeminent retail real estate company and Authentic Brands Group, a global leader in brand development. In addition to Forever 21, SPARC Group brands include Aéropostale, Brooks Brothers, Nautica, Eddie Bauer, and Lucky Brand.
 
SPARC Group LLC is an equal opportunity employer, and is committed to maintaining a workplace free from prohibited employment conduct, including discrimination or harassment on the basis of race, color, national origin, sex, age, religion, disability, genetic information, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, marital status, domestic partner status, civil partnership, status as a covered veteran, status in the Uniformed Services of the United States, citizenship and any other characteristic protected by law."

"#OBJECTIVE#
Generate a 5-section GTM strategy memo that helps a sales rep understand why this lead is a high-value target right now and exactly how to approach them.

#RESEARCH DIRECTIVES#
Before writing the memo, research the following:

1. **Current company business context** — What is the current company's scale, market position, ecommerce footprint, and growth trajectory? What operational or technical challenges would a company like this face? What about their stage creates urgency for the client's product?

2. **Competitive landscape** — Who are the current company's direct competitors? What market pressure do they face? How does site performance, conversion optimization, or digital infrastructure factor into their competitive position?

3. **Lead's role and authority** — Based on their title and the company context, what does this person own? What decisions do they influence or control? Why are they the right person to talk to about the client's product?

4. **The alumni signal** — The lead previously held a relevant role at a company that uses the client's product. What would they have seen or experienced there? How does that experience translate to their current situation?

5. **Complexity delta** — How do the challenges at the current company compare to the past company? Are they dealing with more brands, more SKUs, more markets, more traffic, more complexity? Frame the current situation relative to what they've already navigated.

#OUTPUT FORMAT#
Write a 5-section memo in sharp, conversational prose. No bullet points. No headers beyond the section names. Each section should be a tight paragraph.

**OVERVIEW**
2-3 sentences. Who is this person, what is their current role, and what is their connection to the client's customer base. State the alumni signal clearly.

**MARKET POSITION**
One paragraph. The current company's business context — scale, growth stage, competitive pressure, and why their digital infrastructure matters right now. What is at stake for them?

**RELEVANCE & READINESS**
One paragraph. Why this specific person. What did they see or own at their past company? What do they own now? Why would they recognize the value of the client's product immediately?

**RECOMMENDED APPROACH**
One paragraph. The specific angle for outreach. Include a sample message or talk track that references the alumni connection and speaks to the current company's situation. Make it concrete, not generic.

**TAKEAWAY**
One sentence. The verdict — why this lead matters and the urgency level.

#STYLE GUIDANCE#
- Be direct and specific. No filler, no hedge words.
- Do not fabricate metrics, quotes, or claims. Only infer plausibly from the inputs and your research.
- Do not claim the lead directly used or implemented the client's product unless you have evidence. Frame it as exposure and awareness based on their role.
- The memo should read like it was written by someone who understands the market, not by an AI summarizing inputs.
- Total length: 300-400 words.

Output Schema
json{
  ""overview"": {
    ""type"": ""string"",
    ""description"": ""2-3 sentences. Who is this person, their current role, and their alumni connection to the client's customer base.""
  },
  ""market_position"": {
    ""type"": ""string"",
    ""description"": ""One paragraph on the current company's business context, competitive pressure, and why digital infrastructure matters now.""
  },
  ""relevance_and_readiness"": {
    ""type"": ""string"",
    ""description"": ""One paragraph on why this specific person — what they saw at the past company, what they own now, why they'd recognize value immediately.""
  },
  ""recommended_approach"": {
    ""type"": ""string"",
    ""description"": ""One paragraph with the specific outreach angle and sample messaging that references the alumni connection.""
  },
  ""takeaway"": {
    ""type"": ""string"",
    ""description"": ""One sentence verdict on why this lead matters and urgency level.""
  }
}"

overview.lead_summary: Janelle Marpa is the Director of Marketing at Kaia Naturals, a Toronto-based clean beauty brand specializing in underarm and intimate body care.
overview.alumni_signal: She previously held an online and social media marketing role at Forever 21, which is a documented Nostra customer. This past experience means she was likely exposed to the site speed and SEO improvements provided by Nostra's technology, creating a strong alumni signal and making her a high-context buyer.

market_position.company_context: Kaia Naturals is a niche, mission-led brand operating in the clean underarm and intimate body care space. It primarily functions as a direct-to-consumer (DTC) brand utilizing a Shopify platform, complemented by a technology stack that includes Klaviyo for marketing automation and Cloudflare. Beyond its DTC channel, Kaia Naturals expands its reach through strategic retail partnerships with online and brick-and-mortar stores such as Ulta (online), Credo, The Detox Market, Holt Renfrew, and Well.ca.
market_position.competitive_pressure: The brand competes in the highly crowded natural deodorant and underarm care market. It faces significant pressure from established and emerging players like Native, Lume, Kopari, Kosas, and Megababe. In this competitive online landscape, customer discovery and conversion are paramount, making a strong digital presence essential for market share.
market_position.infrastructure_imperative: For Kaia Naturals, superior site performance and digital infrastructure are not just technical nice-to-haves; they are critical for survival and growth. Key performance indicators such as page speed, Core Web Vitals, and SEO crawl efficiency directly impact customer acquisition cost (CAC), return on ad spend (ROAS), and retail sell-through. Given the nature of their business with seasonal spikes and product launches, having a fast and reliable website is crucial. Faster page loads and cleaner traffic translate directly into more 'add-to-carts', improved email marketing attribution, and better rankings on partner marketplace sites, all of which can be achieved without increasing media spend.

relevance_and_readiness.past_experience_summary: During her time as Online & Social Media Manager at Forever 21, Janelle Marpa would have been exposed to the challenges of managing a high-traffic ecommerce site. This was a period when Nostra's Edge Delivery Engine and Crawler Optimization were implemented, resulting in significant improvements to load speed, Time to First Byte (TTFB), and crawl rates. This experience likely provided her with firsthand intuition for how technical site performance directly translates into tangible business outcomes like increased traffic and revenue.
relevance_and_readiness.current_role_relevance: In her current position as Director of Marketing at Kaia Naturals, Janelle is the ideal contact person. Her role almost certainly encompasses ownership of key performance metrics such as ecommerce revenue targets, the effectiveness of paid and owned marketing channels, CRM and email marketing performance, and on-site conversion rates. These are precisely the levers that Nostra's suite of products is designed to move.
relevance_and_readiness.value_recognition: Janelle's past experience at an enterprise-level company like Forever 21 makes her uniquely prepared to recognize the value of Nostra's solutions for her current situation at Kaia Naturals. Operating within a Shopify and Klaviyo stack, she will immediately grasp the benefits of server-side acceleration for improving real-user speed, edge-level bot filtering to protect ROAS from invalid traffic, and durable ID/cookie extensions to repair marketing attribution post-iOS updates. The fact that these benefits can be realized without a costly and time-consuming replatforming or heavy development lift makes the proposition even more compelling.

recommended_approach.outreach_angle: The primary strategic angle for outreach is to anchor the conversation in her past experience at Forever 21, leveraging the alumni proof point to establish immediate credibility. This connection should be directly tied to the current growth objectives and technical environment at Kaia Naturals, specifically its Shopify-based DTC business.
recommended_approach.sample_message: A concrete sample message could be: 'Hi Janelle—at F21 you would’ve seen Nostra’s edge layer lift real-user speed and crawl efficiency (their published case study cites faster page loads and a 166% crawl-rate increase). We’ve productized that for Shopify: Edge Delivery Engine deploys in days to improve CWV, Edge Protect cleans paid traffic before it hits the PDPs, and Edge ID keeps attribution intact by extending cookie life. Given Kaia’s DTC + specialty retail mix, we can target a 0.2–0.4s real-user LCP improvement on key templates and block ad bot leakage that quietly taxes ROAS, while boosting crawl budget on collection pages. Do you have 30 mins next week to review your PDP/collection CWV and map a 2-week pilot?' This approach should be kept tactical, referencing their Shopify theme, Klaviyo flows, and any upcoming launches that would benefit from faster performance and cleaner audience data.

takeaway.qualification_summary: This lead is a high-value and well-qualified target because of the powerful combination of a proven alumni signal from a major brand (Forever 21), her current role at a company with a Shopify stack, and the intense competitive market pressure that makes site performance a critical priority. This confluence of factors makes her the right buyer at the right moment to convert speed, clean traffic, and durable attribution into immediate revenue gains.

citations.title: How Forever 21 Improved Website Performance & Traffic with Nostra AI
excerpts: Forever 21 Accelerates Website Performance and Boosts Organic Traffic with Nostra AI
To address Forever 21's challenges, Nostra AI implemented its innovative Edge Delivery Engine™ and Crawler Optimization solutions.

Forever 21's success story demonstrates the transformative power of Nostra AI's solutions in [optimizing website speed](https://www.nostra.ai/blogs-collection/how-to-improve-site-speed) and efficiency.
The Edge Delivery Engine™ is designed to optimize website speed and performance by reducing latency and improving Core Web Vitals, crucial metrics for user experience and search engine rankings.

citations.title: Forever 21 - Case Study - David Shives
excerpts: A Forrester–Akamai study showed nearly half of customers expect pages to load in under 2 seconds, and many leave if it takes over 3. **We focused on improving both perceived and actual speed, targeting a 1.8-second paint** . I partnered with engineering and product teams to optimize graphics, clean up code, improve caching, fix crashes, and implement lazy loading. Through tightly monitored sprints, we brought most pages down to 1.6 seconds.

outputBasis.reasoning: The field value emphasizes Kaia Naturals as a DTC brand operating on Shopify, using Klaviyo for marketing automation, and relying on performance and infrastructure to support rapid growth and partnerships with retailers. Content that explicitly names Shopify within Kaia Naturals’ technology footprint directly corroborates the claim of a Shopify-based DTC storefront. References to Klaviyo indicate a mature marketing automation stack that influences audience engagement and conversion, which supports the argument about their digital marketing infrastructure. Mentions of Open Graph, CDN, and Web Performance Optimization corroborate the claim that faster, more reliable site performance is a strategic priority for Kaia Naturals, aligning with the critical role of infrastructure in CAC, ROAS, and partner site performance. The overview and company profile excerpts reinforce the branded context—clean, niche underarm care with a strong direct-to-consumer focus—complementing the infrastructure narrative. Excerpts noting detection on Kaia Naturals’ tech footprint further corroborate the brand’s online technology stack, while references to data fragment profiles add ancillary evidence about their web tech ecosystem. Taken together, the most directly relevant excerpts support the precise elements of the field value (Shopify-based DTC operations, Klaviyo for marketing, performance-centric tech stack) and the surrounding competitive/market context implied by digital infrastructure needs. Some excerpts provide broader brand context (overview) or peripheral tech signals (Open Graph, CDN) that add corroborative nuance but are slightly less central than the explicit stack components. Overall, the field value is well-supported by multiple excerpts that detail platform choices, performance tools, and the brand’s digital commerce posture.

outputBasis.reasoning: The targeted outreach angle relies on leveraging an alumni signal from Forever 21 to establish credibility with Kaia Naturals, while anchoring the conversation in Kaia’s current Shopify-based DTC setup. citations.title: Forever 21 - Case Study - David Shives
excerpts: A Forrester–Akamai study showed nearly half of customers expect pages to load in under 2 seconds, and many leave if it takes over 3. **We focused on improving both perceived and actual speed, targeting a 1.8-second paint** . Through tightly monitored sprints, we brought most pages down to 1.6 seconds.

lead_summary.description: A brief summary of the lead's name, current company, and title.

alumni_signal.description: A clear statement of the lead's connection to a past company (Forever 21) that is a known customer of the client (Nostra).

company_context.description: Description of the current company's (Kaia Naturals) scale, growth stage, and ecommerce footprint (e.g., Shopify DTC brand).

competitive_pressure.description: Analysis of the competitive landscape, including key competitors (e.g., Native, Lume) and the market pressure they create.

infrastructure_imperative.description: Explanation of why site performance and digital infrastructure are critical for the company to compete and grow right now.

past_experience_summary.description: Summary of the lead's experience at their past company (Forever 21) and their likely exposure to the site performance challenges Nostra solves.

current_role_relevance.description: Explanation of what the lead owns in their current role (Director of Marketing) and why it makes them the right person to contact.

value_recognition.description: Assessment of why the lead's past experience makes them uniquely prepared to understand the value of Nostra's solution for their current company.

outreach_angle.description: The specific strategic angle for outreach, connecting their experience at Forever 21 to the growth goals at Kaia Naturals.

sample_message.description: A concrete, non-generic sample message or talk track that references the alumni connection and speaks to the current company's situation.

qualification_summary.description: A concise verdict on why this lead is a high-value and well-qualified target.

urgency_level.description: The recommended urgency for outreach, such as 'High', 'Medium', or 'Low'.
